action.reasoning: Observation: routing is fixed and the best available checkpoint remains the fullobs model with mean_reward 0.0033, succeeding only on Fetch. Analysis: PPO from sparse rewards is not learning the navigation tasks, but Fetch appears solvable and likely benefits from mission/object conditioning. The highest-probability improvement within budget is to add a dedicated Fetch specialist and route only Fetch to it while keeping the existing fullobs model for all other environments. This is incremental, uses the working router setup, and can improve the only non-zero component without risking regression elsewhere. Decision: finish/clean the training and model utilities, train a Fetch-focused PPO on MiniGrid-Fetch-8x8-N3-v0 for a moderate run, create a mixed router that sends Fetch to the new specialist and all other envs to fullobs_200k, smoke-test predict locally, then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --envs MiniGrid-Fetch-8x8-N3-v0 --total_timesteps 300000 --n_envs 8 --save_dir checkpoints/fetch_specialist_300k && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/router_fetch_mix --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
